name: Temporary Mom
original_name: คุณแม่แก้ขัด
overview: Arunrada blackmails Pathiharn for money to help her sister, but ends up agreeing to pose as the mother of his missing wife's son. As she bonds with the child and Pathiharn, love begins to grow - until his long-lost wife unexpectedly returns.

trailers.title: คุณแม่แก้ขัด | ละครดี 7HD ปี 2568
